name_en: Burgundy patent leather quilted _CASSANDRE chain bag. A super practical small bag, Italian imported original top-grain cowhide, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite craftsmanship with a square quilted pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two pockets, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!
name_cn:
Burgundy patent leather quilted _CASSANDRE chain bag. A super practical small bag, Italian imported original top-grain cowhide, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite craftsmanship with a square quilted pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two pockets, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!
Model: 743364
Size: 23x14x3cm
Strap Length: 47cm
